creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Remko Lodder <remko@elvandar.org> -----

From: Remko Lodder <remko@elvandar.org>
To: Tortise <tortise@paradise.net.nz>

Hello,

What you are describing might exactly be the problem. The Dell BIOS might
have been altered a bit or something. There are newer versions for the
BIOS available as I saw on: http://ftp.us.dell.com/bios/

Would you be so kind to see if there is a newer version for your model,
and whether flashing it to that BIOS might resolve the problem? Ofcourse
read the instructions for flasing carefully!

Cheers,
Remko

----- End forwarded message -----
